datasets.title: PURE: a Dataset of Public Requirements Documents
notes: Primary trusted source for authentic requirements text.
Use as the origin layer for source-grounded dialogue/slot/requirement annotations.
Do not treat as a conversational benchmark without derived annotations.
caveats: The record states that the documents were gathered from the web and rights on the original documents may not be fully known.
Use provenance and citation carefully and avoid unnecessary redistribution of large source text excerpts.

datasets.title: Software Requirements Data Set
notes: Supporting source that preserves original files and plain text conversions from multiple requirement corpora.
Useful for extraction scripts and for cross-checking text conversions.
caveats: This dataset aggregates from multiple sources, so split policy must avoid mixing document families across train and test.

datasets.title: Promise+: A dataset of labeled software requirements
notes: Use for external FR/NFR validation and classification-oriented sanity checks.
Do not use as the main source of conversational data.

datasets.title: NICE: Non-Functional Requirements Identification, Classification, and Explanation Using Small Language Models
notes: Use for external NFR subtype validation and reporting.
This is a relabeled dataset derived from the PROMISE family.
